notes: RoleV3 keeps RoleV2's all-attempt discipline but separates suppression magnitude, consistency, foul exposure, offense opportunity cost, and role-choice confidence.
Promotion requires a cleaner stability story than RoleV2; near-tie wins alone are not enough.
